word: G3699 - ὅπου - hópou - hop'-oo - In what place

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: In what place
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: NA / Not Available
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3739 and G4225; what (-ever) where, that is, at whichever spot: - in what place, where (-as, -soever), whither (+ soever).
